zh.lifeSummary: 當Elimar II Count of Oldenburg於1070年出生時，他的父親Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburg31歲，母親Richenza von Dithmarschen26歲。他於1120年之前與Eilika von Werl-Riedberg在德國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1142年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elimar II Count of Oldenburg于1070年出生时，他的父亲Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburg31岁，母亲Richenza von Dithmarschen26岁。他于1120年之前与Eilika von Werl-Riedberg在德国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1142年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Elimar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Elimar II Count of Oldenburg was born in 1070, his father, Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburg, was 31 and his mother, Richenza von Dithmarschen, was 26. He married Eilika von Werl-Riedberg before 1120, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1142.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elimar II Count of Oldenburg est né en 1070, son père, Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburg, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Richenza von Dithmarschen, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Eilika von Werl-Riedberg avant 1120, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1142.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elimar II Count of Oldenburg 1070 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburg 31 und seine Mutter Richenza von Dithmarschen 26. Er hat vor 1120 in Deutschland Eilika von Werl-Riedberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1142.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elimar II Count of Oldenburg è nato il nel 1070, il suo padre, Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburg, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Richenza von Dithmarschen, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Eilika von Werl-Riedberg prima del 1120, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1142.

ja.lifeSummary: Elimar II Count of Oldenburgが1070年に生まれた時，父Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburgは31歳，母Richenza von Dithmarschenは26歳であった。1120年以前にドイツでEilika von Werl-Riedbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1142年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elimar II Count of Oldenburg(이)가 1070년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburg(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Richenza von Dithmarschen(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1120년 이전 독일에서 Eilika von Werl-Riedberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1142년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elimar II Count of Oldenburg nasceu em 1070, seu pai, Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburg, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Richenza von Dithmarschen, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Eilika von Werl-Riedberg antes 1120, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1142.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elimar II Count of Oldenburg родился в 1070 г., его отцу по имени Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Richenza von Dithmarschen, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Eilika von Werl-Riedberg перед 1120 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1142 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elimar II Count of Oldenburg nació en 1070, su papá, Egilmar I. Graf von Oldenburg, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Richenza von Dithmarschen, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Eilika von Werl-Riedberg antes de 1120, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1142.
